query:
UPDATE pictures
               SET captured_at = $2,
                   gps_lat     = $3,
                   gps_lng     = $4,
                   gps_alt     = $5,
                   orientation = $6,
                   exif_data   = (exif_data - $7::text[]) || $8::jsonb,
                   exif_sync_status     = $9,
                   updated_at           = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'utc'),
                   last_pipeline_run_at = NULL
               WHERE id = $1
